text: Hey, this is Sarah. There's a note on your Medicare profile that your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed. Just a quick confirmation from you and we're all set. Do you have Part A and Part B? No, I do not. Sorry, it looks like you don't qualify for the plans. Have a great day.
